description: The TransformStreamDriver is used to convert a stream of position rotation and scale values into drives which can drive slot transforms. It is used internally by the user positioning system.

fields.PositionStream: The source of float3 values used to position the slot.
fields.RotationStream: The source of floatQ values used to rotate the slot.
fields.ScaleStream: The source of float3 values used to scale the slot.
fields.RootSpaceStream: The slot being used for the root space.
fields.Position: The field to drive with the streamed in position values.
fields.Rotation: The field to drive with the streamed in rotation values.
fields.Scale: The field to drive with the streamed in scale values.
fields.AllowOffsets: Whether to allow offsets to the affected slot/object.
fields.ResetStreamsOnDestroy: Whether to reset the incoming streams upon destroying this slot.
fields.PositionOffset: Offset to the resulting position value this is driving.
fields.RotationOffset: Offset to the resulting rotation value this is driving.
fields.ScaleOffset: Offset to the resulting scale value this is driving.
fields.RunBeforePhysics: Whether or not to run before physics. can fix some issues where users fly off of a platform being driven by this component.
